/CAL:TO SET DA MOTION TO REVOKE PROBATION, TRAILING #17012597/MTR-DA/DEFTADV/DEFT ADM VIO/REVSA:05-25-17/REIN ORIG TC/PROB MOD/CTW:90/PJ:1 YEAR/ADDL CTS:1/X:(THE COURT RECOMMENDS THAT THE DEFENDANT BE ALLOWED TO SERVE HISCOUNTY JAIL SENTENCE IN THE  ROADS TO RECOVERY  PROGRAM)/PROB EXT:03-26-20/4019HALF/X:(IF PROBATION IS REVOKED IN THE FUTURE, THE MATTER IS TO BE HEARD BY JUDGE BRUCE CHAN)/

CONTD TS DA MTR/CAL:DA MTR FILING/X:MOTION TO REVOKE PROBATION IS FILED INCOURT BY THE DISTRICT ATTORNEY,/X:DEFENDANT IS DULY ARRAIGNED ON THE MOTION TO REVOKE PROBATION,  DENIAL OF ANY AND ALL ALLEGATIONS ENTERED,/S20/TBH:17012597/PROB ADM REV/SHER/NB/CONTD:DA MTR PREHEARING CONFERENCE ON 09-01-17/DOP/CONTD:TO SET DA MTR HEARING ON 09-08-17/DOP/
/CAL:TS DA MTR/CONTD SUPP RPT ON DA MTR/DA-MTR/SUPP:06-09-17/S26/CTORD:APDTO FORWARD REPORT TO RESPECTIVE DEPARTMENT/DOP/CONTD:RECEIPT OF SUPPLEMENTAL REPORT AND TO SET DA MTR/

/CAL:MODIFICATION OF PROBATION/PROB MOD/CTORD:THE DEFENDANT TO UNDERGO 90DAYS OF INTENSIVE OUTPATIENT DRUG COUNSELING TO BE MONITORED BY APD/X:THIS MODIFICATION IS PART OF THE DISPOSITION IN CASE #17002119 (HARVEY WAIVER)

/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS:1 & 2/REMA/ARBUCKLE/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION//X:THE SENTENCES TO COUNT 1 & 2 ARE IDENTICAL AND CONCURRENT,/PRES:02-09-17/TWS/DOP/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW60/LDPX: 01-17-17/987,2/X: DEFENDNANT WAS REFERRED AND RELEASED TOACM ON 11-08-16, ACM PROGRESS REPORT PRESENTED TO COURT: DEFENDANT HAS NOTCHECKEDIN WITH ACM AS REQUIRED, DEFENDANT HAS NOT ATTENDED GROUP AS REQUIRED,  COURT ORDERS DEFENDANT TO COMPLY WITH ACM PLAN AS FOLLOWS: REPORT TO THE OFFICE TWICED IN PERSON AND ATTEND WEEKLY COURT ACCOUNTABLE CASE MANAGEMENT CENTER/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/
/CAL:TO TERMINATE PROBATION/CTORD:PROBATION IN #16019841 IS HEREBY TERMINATED AS UNSUCCESSFUL/
/CAL:SUPPL RPT ON DA MTR & TS DA MTR/MTR-DA/DEFT ADV/DEFT ADM VIO/REIN ORIG TC/PROB MOD/PJ:90 DAYS/ADDL CTS:19/PROB EXT: 03-26-20/4019HALF/
